name: Add Customer Accounts
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Customer Manually"}], "data-id": "add-a-customer-manually"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add a customer manually:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Add New Customer", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill out the details for the customer and press the "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " option in the top right hand corner. If you need help with understanding any of the fields in the customer card, see our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1566-customers-overview", "children": [{"text": "overview guide here"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once completed, press "}, {"text": "Save.", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Customers in Bulk"}], "data-id": "add-customers-in-bulk"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use the Data Import Wizard to import "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comma-separated_values", "children": [{"text": ".CSV files (spreadsheets)"}]}, {"text": " into your website with all of your customers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here is a sample copy of our popular customer fields to use as a template: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://docs.neto.com.au/assets/files/Templates/import_customers_popular.csv", "children": [{"text": "Download here"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "Here is a sample copy of all customer fields to use as a template: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://docs.neto.com.au/assets/files/Templates/import_customers_all.csv", "children": [{"text": "Download here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To use the import wizard, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": " then click Perform complex import and select Start Data Import Wizard."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upload the template file and click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Map the fields in your CSV file to the fields in Neto. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set your update options and click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This will now generate a batch process which will take time depending on other tasks in the queue."}]}]}]}]
